name: conditional-get fetcher: a successful 200 persists the etag and last_modified alongside the content hash
command: bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/standards/conditional-get.sh" --source-id aws --store-dir "$PWD/store" --simulate-status 200 --etag etag-v1 --last-modified lm-v1 --body-hash abc && grep -q etag-v1 "$PWD/store/aws.json" && grep -q lm-v1 "$PWD/store/aws.json" && grep -q abc "$PWD/store/aws.json" && echo store-ok 1>&2
